profile.name: Gerry Vien Flores
profile.subtitle: Software Developer • BSIT Graduate • IT Specialist
bio: Hi, I’m a Software Developer at Clario Capital and a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology graduate from the University of Camarines Norte. I specialize in web development, custom software, and intelligent automation, helping turn complex workflows into streamlined, scalable, and reliable systems.

I value efficiency, integrity, and purposeful work. Every project I build is guided by the goal of creating practical digital solutions that are not only functional, but also trustworthy and impactful.

projects.title: Transaction Recording System
projects.desc: A VB.NET-powered point-of-sale solution that streamlines product transactions through automatic computations, instant receipt printing, and an intuitive cashier-friendly interface — cutting down manual entry errors and boosting store recording efficiency by 30%. Built with VB.NET and MySQL.

projects.title: Medical Recording Web App
projects.desc: A PHP-based web platform that digitizes patient profiles, prescriptions, and visit histories with a clean input-output workflow — replacing tedious paper-based logs and improving medical recording efficiency by 50%. Built with PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.

projects.title: Thriveway MSP Cloud
projects.desc: A multi-tenant cloud platform that automates Microsoft 365 mailbox provisioning, Pax8 tenant onboarding, and Instantly campaign integration — with RBAC, audit logging, and Microsoft SSO built in. Streamlined day-to-day operations and lifted company production efficiency by 65%. Built with React (TypeScript), Python, and PowerShell.

projects.title: Puncto Ai
projects.desc: An AI-assisted grammar, punctuation, and spelling tool that highlights and corrects mistakes in real time — capable of resolving up to 95% of punctuation errors across 500-word inputs using Hugging Face-trained models. Built with Python, FastAPI, and React (TypeScript).

projects.title: BioHome Game
projects.desc: An educational Android game that teaches biomolecules through interactive exploration, puzzles, and narrative-driven gameplay — designed to spark curiosity and sustain student interest in biology. Built with Godot and C#.

projects.title: Queen Pineapple Supply Chain Simulation
projects.desc: A research-backed simulation study analyzing the Queen Pineapple supply chain in Camarines Norte — modeling logistics flows, identifying bottlenecks, and informing data-driven strategies for local growers and distributors. Published as an academic paper and built with AnyLogic and Java.

projects.title: SageSpend
projects.desc: a lightweight personal finance web app for tracking expenses, savings, and debt. It features monthly budget allocation with overspend alerts, per-loan balance tracking with automatic paid/active status, future-dated expense planning, and a dashboard of KPIs and trend charts. Built as a fully serverless React + TypeScript app: guests get full functionality with browser-local storage and CSV/JSON export, while an optional Supabase login adds cloud sync secured by row-level security — all deployed on free tiers with zero backend to maintain.
